lines: Yemw’ abaguzwe n'amaraso Ya Yes' Umucunguzi, Nimuze, mumupfukamire :
Dor' isoko y'amaraso ye Yashyizweho kubwanyu : Mum witabe ngw aboze namwe :
Dor' aya mazi y'ubugingo :Nimuze, muyanyweho, Mumwitab' abamar' inyota :
Kand' intege nke z'umubiri N'imanga y'umutima Bimarwa n'Umusaraba we :
Mwa ndushyi mwe ziremerewe,Nimwemere, mwihane Ni mworoshy' imitima yanyu!
